name: id_boundary_negative_value
description: Test that negative ID values are rejected when minimum constraint is 1.

name: name_length_boundary_exceeded
description: Test that name strings exceeding maxLength of 100 characters are rejected.

name: name_empty_string_violation
description: Test that empty name strings violate minLength constraint of 1.

name: photourls_empty_array_violation
description: Test that empty photoUrls array violates minItems constraint of 1.

name: special_characters_in_name
description: Test that special characters, unicode, and escape sequences in name are handled correctly.
input_hint: name: '<script>alert(1)</script>' or name: '\x00\x01' or name: emoji characters

name: id_minimum_boundary_violation
description: Test that id values below the minimum of 1 are rejected or handled appropriately.

name: name_length_boundary_violations
description: Test that name field respects minLength of 1 and maxLength of 100 constraints.
input_hint: name: '' (empty string), name with 101 characters, name with special chars like <script>, " or null bytes

name: photourls_empty_array_violation
description: Test that photoUrls array with minItems of 1 rejects empty arrays.

name: missing_required_fields
description: Test behavior when required fields name and photoUrls are omitted from request body.
input_hint: Request with only id provided, request with photoUrls but no name, completely empty body {}

name: invalid_enum_status_value
description: Test that status field only accepts the defined enum values and rejects invalid statuses.

name: null_status_parameter
description: Test behavior when status parameter is explicitly set to null instead of omitted or using default value.

name: case_sensitivity_status_value
description: Test whether status enum values are case-sensitive and reject 'Available', 'PENDING', or 'Sold'.

name: whitespace_in_status_parameter
description: Test how the API handles status values with leading/trailing whitespace that don't match enum exactly.

name: multiple_status_parameters
description: Test behavior when multiple status query parameters are provided instead of a single value.

name: invalid_enum_value_with_special_chars
description: Test API response when status parameter contains special characters or SQL injection attempts.

name: empty_tags_array
description: Test behavior when tags parameter is an empty array instead of omitted or populated.

name: tags_with_special_characters
description: Test handling of special characters and URL encoding in tag values.

name: extremely_long_tag_string
description: Test behavior with excessively long individual tag strings exceeding typical limits.

name: null_tag_values_in_array
description: Test handling of null values within the tags array parameter.

name: duplicate_tags_in_array
description: Test whether duplicate tag values are handled correctly and if results are deduplicated.

name: petId_zero_boundary
description: Verify endpoint rejects petId=0 when minimum is 1, testing lower boundary enforcement.

name: petId_negative_integer
description: Confirm negative petId values are rejected despite integer type accepting negatives.

name: petId_max_int64_overflow
description: Test behavior when petId exceeds maximum int64 value (9223372036854775807).

name: petId_float_precision_loss
description: Verify endpoint handles large floating-point numbers that lose precision when cast to int64.

name: missing_petId_parameter
description: Confirm proper error response when required petId path parameter is omitted entirely.

name: petid_boundary_max_int64
description: Test petId parameter with maximum int64 value to verify boundary handling.

name: petid_boundary_negative_value
description: Test petId parameter with negative integer to verify validation rejects invalid IDs.

name: name_query_special_characters
description: Test name parameter with special characters and URL encoding edge cases.

name: status_empty_string_vs_null
description: Test status parameter with empty string versus omitted parameter to detect null/missing handling differences.
input_hint: status = '' (empty string) vs not including status param

name: concurrent_same_petid_updates
description: Test race condition when multiple requests update the same petId simultaneously.
input_hint: Send 10 concurrent POST requests to same petId with different name/status values

name: delete_pet_with_max_int64_id
description: Test deletion with petId set to maximum int64 value (9223372036854775807) to verify boundary handling.

name: delete_pet_with_negative_id
description: Test deletion with negative petId value to verify if API rejects or handles negative integers.

name: delete_pet_with_nonexistent_id
description: Test deletion of a petId that exists syntactically but has never been created in the system.

name: delete_pet_concurrent_requests
description: Test simultaneous DELETE requests for the same petId to verify race condition handling and idempotency.
input_hint: Send 5 concurrent DELETE requests with identical petId

name: delete_pet_missing_authorization_header
description: Test DELETE request without required authentication credentials to verify auth edge case handling.
input_hint: Omit Authorization header or send with invalid/expired token
